title: Senior Doctor - Boehringer Ingelheim India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Boehringer Ingelheim India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Boehringer Ingelheim India in Lucknow offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Boehringer Ingelheim India:
Boehringer Ingelheim India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Boehringer Ingelheim India!
